user_request: đang bình quân già quyền ,đợt đầu 400, đợt sau 500 nhưng xuất kho thì đã trừ 400

constraints: Must adhere to Vietnamese Accounting Standards (VAS 02 - Hàng tồn kho)
Cannot change historical ledger data when switching COGS methods
Running balance must reflect accurate chronological order of transactions
business_rules: Export slips must automatically calculate unit cost based on the chosen COGS method
If inventory contains data, COGS method setting must be locked (Safe Lock)
Users must be forced to set COGS method before making any inventory transactions

intent_analysis.primary_intent: Fix COGS calculation bug and implement UI/UX safeguards for accounting principles.
secondary_intents: Disable manual unit price input for export slips
Ensure chronological sorting of same-day transactions

reasoning_steps.description: Analyzed export slip UI and disabled the unit price input, as the backend overrides it with the calculated COGS.

Investigated the user-reported bug where COGS calculation was incorrect. Identified that multiple receipts on the same day had identical timestamps (00:00:00), causing non-deterministic sorting and breaking the running balance.
Modified backend logic to append TimeOfDay to the user-selected date to guarantee strict chronological ordering.
Wiped corrupted inventory data and reset stock to 0 to allow clean testing.
Analyzed accounting principles regarding changing COGS methods mid-period and recommended a Safe Lock mechanism to prevent historical data corruption.
Implemented Safe Lock UI and a blocking modal for empty inventories to force users to configure the COGS method before transacting.
Fixed a UI race condition (modal flash) during initial data fetch.
Implemented localStorage persistence for the active inventory tab.

actions.description: Provided testing scenarios and wholesale price suggestions for construction materials.
Diagnosed non-deterministic database sorting due to missing time components in user-submitted dates.
Fixed Date assignment by adding DateTime.UtcNow.TimeOfDay to ensure sequential tracking.
Created and executed a temporary endpoint to wipe corrupted AccountingLedgerS2 and InventoryReceipt tables.

decision_points.decision: Disable manual unit price input on export slips
decision_points.reason: Backend automatically calculates COGS based on weighted average; manual input causes user confusion between 'Selling Price' and 'Cost Price'.

decision_points.decision: Append current TimeOfDay to the chosen Date
decision_points.reason: Ensures that multiple transactions created on the exact same calendar day maintain chronological order in the database for running balance calculations.

decision_points.decision: Implement Safe Lock and Blocking Modal
decision_points.reason: Prevents users from violating accounting consistency principles by changing COGS methods after transactions exist, and ensures the method is explicitly set before starting.

output_summary: Fixed COGS weighted average calculation bug by introducing time-based deterministic sorting. Implemented comprehensive UI/UX safeguards (Safe Lock, Blocking Modal) to enforce accounting consistency rules. Wiped corrupted data and added tab state persistence.
